front.prompt: Create a 2D pixel art RPG character design sheet, front view, full body standing idle pose. The character is a Abyss Archer — the 2nd advancement of the Shadow Weaver class in a dark fantasy Korean MMORPG style. Description: advanced Shadow Weaver with semi-plate leather armor (added shoulder and chest plates), shadow coat, large composite bow with shadow energy bowstring, arrows with abyss aura, red glowing eyes, shadow wing traces emerging from back. Art style: 512x512 pixel art with clean sharp pixel edges, 2px black outline, no anti-aliasing, 2.5 head-to-body chibi proportions. Transparent background. Top-left 45-degree lighting with 3-step cel shading. DO NOT include text, watermarks, or 3D effects.
